bundle.shortDescription: Unofficial skunkworks desktop UI for Grok Build (ACP client).
bundle.longDescription: Skunkworks Grok UI is an independent, unofficial desktop client for the Grok Build coding agent. It provides a multi-project chat sidebar, collapsible agent work, attachments, and permission prompts over the Agent Client Protocol. Not affiliated with xAI, SpaceX, SpaceXAI, or X Corp. Build from source; no official support.
